---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new restorer, pipeline preset, or API feature
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the motivation.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature. For a new restorer, include:
- Model name and paper link
- Input/output category (super_resolution, colorization, etc.)
- Typical VRAM requirement
- Whether the code/weights are publicly available

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider?

## Additional context

Screenshots, example outputs, related papers, etc.
